query:
-- BUG FIX retroactivo: Crear booking operativo para Rata Maravillada
-- La fecha preferida del lead era 2026-07-01, no 2026-03-29
-- Primero actualizar la reserva con la fecha correcta
UPDATE reservations 
SET booking_date = '2026-07-01'
WHERE id = 450005 AND customer_name LIKE '%Rata%';

-- Luego crear el booking operativo
INSERT INTO bookings (bookingNumber, experienceId, quoteId, clientName, clientEmail, clientPhone, scheduledDate, numberOfPersons, totalAmount, status, notes, reservationId, sourceChannel)
VALUES (
  CONCAT('BK-RETRO-', UNIX_TIMESTAMP(), '-RATA'),
  0,
  (SELECT id FROM quotes WHERE customer_name LIKE '%Rata%' OR title LIKE '%Rata%' LIMIT 1),
  'Rata Marravillada',
  'jgrande@skicenter.es',
  '693026894',
  '2026-07-01 10:00:00',
  1,
  54.45,
  'confirmado',
  'Booking retroactivo — Pago CRM confirmado — Day Pass Náyade',
  450005,
  'otro'
);
